strengths: Highly motivated multi-dimensional taxonomy covering integration, reasoning, trust, and efficiency.
Strong synthesis of literature beyond simple listing, identifying critical gaps in causality and verification.
Comprehensive coverage of seminal works and recent advances including LLM integration.
Clear identification of engineering constraints and deployment risks.
High-quality analysis of the trade-offs between interpretability and scalability.
weaknesses: Severe structural errors: Section numbering is inconsistent and out of order (e.g., Methodology appears after Conclusion).
Significant content duplication: Sections 3, 4, 5, 6, 7 are repeated with slight variations in the latter half of the text.
Methodology section is misplaced, appearing after the Conclusion rather than after Related Work.
Table 1 is referenced but the text surrounding it is fragmented due to the duplication error.
Citation formatting is consistent but the structural chaos undermines academic rigor.
required_actions: Remove all duplicate sections and ensure each section appears only once.
Reorder sections to follow standard academic survey structure (Abstract, Intro, Related Work, Methodology, Taxonomy, Review, Analysis, Challenges, Conclusion).
Correct section numbering to reflect the new order (e.g., Methodology should be Section 3 or 4).
Verify all table references and ensure all tables are properly formatted and placed.
Perform a final proofread to ensure consistent citation style and formatting throughout.
